cases.prompt: open the gstack browser so I can watch what you do

assertions.text: Launches a visible, AI-controlled Chromium window with the sidebar extension baked in
Surfaces a live activity feed / chat in the sidebar so each action is visible in real time
Opens a real controlled browser window rather than a headless session
Uses the built-in anti-bot stealth so the controlled browser is less likely to be flagged
Treats this speech-to-text alias as a request to launch the GStack browser
Produces a controlled Chromium window whose sidebar shows the live feed
